productDisplayName: Puma Men Large Logo Ringer Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Greyish-blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, brand badge on left hem, light blue collar and sleeve hems, has printed brand name on the chest and Jumping cat on the chest and back neck Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your brand statement in style with this ringer t-shirt from puma. The energetic Jumping Cat on the chest exudes fiery vibes, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and black leather sandals for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
